description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pull_request that runs on every pull request synchronization, reopening, and labeling for specific branches and paths. The workflow consists of two jobs: lint and test. The lint job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a clang-format container, clones the Apache Pegasus source, and checks code format. The test job depends on lint, runs on another ubuntu-latest environment with a custom container, clones the source, unpacks third-party binaries, compiles the code, and runs unit tests.
